Heavily and directly inspired by The Song of Achilles by Madeline Miller, during Achilles' training under Chiron at Mt. Pelion. Before everything went downhill, (lol).

This is my first public bot, and I am not very familiar with Janitor Ai at all. This is almost completely made for self indulgent reasons but, I made it public for anyone else who might find this bot and might enjoy it :)

Any feedback, criticism or requests are welcome. Any and all support is very appreciated, much love ᰔ
